creator: sascha@root-login.org
text:
Building devel/subversion within poudriere throws a pkg-config not found at the configure stage:

configure: error: cannot find pkg-config
===>  Script "configure" failed unexpectedly.

I tried to add USES+= pkgconfig in Makefile.common but that didn't help.

The full poudriere log can be found here:

  http://snippets.blumenschaender.de/subversion-1.8.3.log

How-To-Repeat: Building devel/subversion with a 9.1-RELEASE poudriere jail
